name: Surfingkeys
description: Map your keys for web surfing, expand your browser with javascript and keyboard.

scripts.build:doc: documentation build src/content_scripts/common/api.js src/content_scripts/common/normal.js src/content_scripts/common/clipboard.js src/content_scripts/common/hints.js src/content_scripts/common/visual.js src/content_scripts/front.js src/user_scripts/index.js -f md -o docs/api.md
scripts.build:dev: npm run fix-perms && CONFIG_SERVER_PORT=9600 BUILD_SUFFIX= node ./config/esbuild.config.js development && CONFIG_SERVER_PORT=9602 BUILD_SUFFIX=-test node ./config/esbuild.config.js development
scripts.build: npm-run-all clean test build:doc build:doc-chrome-api build:prod
scripts.lint:js: eslint --config config/eslint.config.js src tests debug scripts --ext .js,.ts
scripts.test:playwright: CONFIG_SERVER_PORT=9602 BUILD_SUFFIX=-test npm run build:dev && bunx playwright test
scripts.test:playwright:parallel: CONFIG_SERVER_PORT=9602 BUILD_SUFFIX=-test npm run build:dev && npm run typecheck && bun scripts/test-parallel.ts
scripts.docker:test:playwright: docker compose run --rm tests bash -c 'CONFIG_SERVER_PORT=9602 BUILD_SUFFIX=-test node ./config/esbuild.config.js development && bunx playwright test "$@"' --
scripts.docker:test:playwright:parallel: GIT_HASH=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) docker compose run --rm tests
scripts.docker:cov:sequential: GIT_HASH=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) docker compose run --rm tests npm run cov:sequential
scripts.docker:cov:parallel: GIT_HASH=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) docker compose run --rm tests npm run cov:parallel
scripts.test:trace: bash -c 'export REPORT_DIR="${REPORT_DIR:-test-artifacts/playwright}"; CONFIG_SERVER_PORT=9602 BUILD_SUFFIX=-test npm run build:dev && REPORT_DIR="$REPORT_DIR" PW_TRACE=1 bunx playwright test ${1:+"$1"}' --
scripts.test:trace-open: bash -c 'export REPORT_DIR="test-artifacts/playwright"; CONFIG_SERVER_PORT=9602 BUILD_SUFFIX=-test npm run build:dev && REPORT_DIR="$REPORT_DIR" PW_TRACE=1 bunx playwright test ${1:+"$1"}; bun scripts/patch-trace-viewer.ts; bun scripts/trace-slides.ts; xdg-open "$REPORT_DIR/slides.html"' --

author: brook hong
